description: User selects November 15, 2026 as the return date.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the green 'Continue' button.

description: The 'Travellers' section becomes visible.

description: User clicks into the adult age input field.
interaction_target: Enter the current age of each adult traveller, not including any dependent children.

description: User types '24' into the adult age input field.
interaction_target: Enter the current age of each adult traveller, not including any dependent children.
frame_description: The characters '24' appear in the input field.

description: User clicks the 'Continue' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the green 'Continue' button.

description: The 'Cover levels' section becomes visible.
frame_description: The UI updates to show the 'Cover levels' section with sliders for cancellation, luggage, and rental car excess.

description: User adjusts the 'Minimum cover for trip cancellation' and other sliders.
frame_description: The user drags the slider handles to change the cover amounts.

description: Drag the trip cancellation slider handle to adjust the minimum cover from $10,000 to $5,000.
frame_description: The user is on the 'Cover levels' page of the Compare the Market travel insurance quote flow, which features sliders for trip cancellation, baggage, and rental car excess cover.

description: The trip cancellation cover value updates to $5,000 on the slider.
frame_description: The trip cancellation slider now shows a minimum cover of $5,000.

description: Drag the baggage slider handle to increase the minimum cover from $5,000 to $8,000.
frame_description: The user is adjusting the baggage cover level using the slider.

description: The baggage cover value updates to $8,000 on the slider.
frame_description: The baggage slider now shows a minimum cover of $8,000.

description: Drag the baggage slider handle to decrease the minimum cover from $8,000 to $2,500.
frame_description: The user is further adjusting the baggage cover level.

description: The baggage cover value updates to $2,500 on the slider.
frame_description: The baggage slider now shows a minimum cover of $2,500.

description: Hover over the baggage slider handle.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the baggage slider handle, which is currently set to $2,500.

description: Drag the baggage slider handle to increase the minimum cover from $2,500 to $3,500.
frame_description: The user is making a final adjustment to the baggage cover level.

description: The baggage cover value updates to $3,500 on the slider.
frame_description: The baggage slider now shows a minimum cover of $3,500.

description: Hover over the $2,000 mark on the rental car excess slider track.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess
frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the rental car excess slider track at the $2,000 position.

description: Click on the rental car excess slider track at the $2,000 mark.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess
frame_description: The user selects a $2,000 minimum cover for rental car excess by clicking on the track.

description: The rental car excess cover value updates to $2,000.
frame_description: The rental car excess slider now shows a minimum cover of $2,000.

description: Hover over the 'Minimum cover for rental car excess' slider track.
interaction_target: Minimum cover for rental car excess
